svg.title: CitySync hackathon AI pipeline — single gpt-4o-mini call
svg.desc: Simplified AI pipeline replacing DistilBERT, SetFit, CLIP, spaCy with a single gpt-4o-mini call, Nominatim for geocoding, PostGIS for spatial, Redis sorted set for frequency, dedup on raw GPS before DP noise.

g.text: replaces: DistilBERT · SetFit · CLIP ViT-B/32 + MLP · spaCy NER
returns JSON: intent · category · severity 1–10 · location_mention · visual_confirms_category · brief_description
vision enabled if image present · structured output = no parsing errors · $0.000135/call
gpt-4o-mini returns confidence field · <0.70 → human review queue
Layer 4 — Privacy vault (dedup done, DP now applied)
HMAC tokenise · numpy Gaussian DP ε=0.5/2.0 · Python decorator access control · structlog audit
Verification engine: gpt-4o vision (full model for before/after comparison)
Better on subtle visual differences than gpt-4o-mini · only used at Step 1 · ~600ms · still <$0.01/verification
